飢餓の厄災を爆薬で目覚めさせた人たち！？: The ones who woke up the Calamity of Famine with explosives!?
でたなぁ～！ こないだの迷惑ゴーレム使い！: There they are~! The troublesome golem user from last time!
ちっが～う！ アタシの名は天才科学者ロジー！<br>ロジー教授とお呼びなさぁ～い:
Wro~ong! My name is the genius scientist Logy!
Address me as Professor Logy~!
そしてオレは教授の心のパートナーにして、<br>その身を護る愛の守護騎士ゴレイヌ:
And I am the Professor's soulmate and partner,
the Guardian Knight of Love, the great Goleinu!
愛の守護騎士って何よ！<br>ゴレイヌはただの助手くんでしょ～？:
What do you mean 'Guardian Knight of Love'!?
You're just my little assistant~!
なんなんだろう？ このテンション……: What's with these two? This energy...
鉄のゴーレムがいる～！ かっこいい～！: There's an iron golem~! So cool~!
おっと、お嬢ちゃん、オレに惚れちゃあ～火傷しちまうぜ！<br>悪いけど、オレ様の:
Whoa there, little lady~ fall for me and you'll get burned! Sorry, but
my heart is set to 'Professor LOVE' and can't be overwritten!
あのねぇ～、このゴレイヌを、<br>ゴーレムなんて古臭い魔術で作られた人形と一緒:
Listen here~, don't go comparing Goleinu
to some puppet made with outdated golem magic!
その名も、汎用作業探査用・知的ニューラルユニット！<br>アタシの最先端の技術を:
His full name is: General-Purpose Labor &
Exploration Intelligent Neural Unit! My masterpiece!
その通り！ つまり、オレ様が、サ・イ・キョ・ウ！<br>ってことよ！:
That's right! In other words, yours truly is THE! STRON! GEST!
You get it!?
お前たち、いったい何者なんだ？<br>ここで何をやってる？:
Who the hell are you two?
What are you doing here?
何って、お宝探しに決まってんでしょ～？<br>使えそうなパーツを回収してんの！:
What else? Treasure hunting, obviously~!
We're salvaging usable parts!
お宝探し？<br>お前たちはそれが目当てで大穴の中を探索してるのか？:
Treasure hunting?
So you're exploring the Abyss just for that?
何よ～、なんか文句があるわけ～？<br>別にアンタのものでもないでしょ～？:
What~? You got a problem with that~?
It's not like any of it belongs to you~!
ホント、邪魔するのだけはやめてよね～！<br>こないだだって厄災起こしちゃうしさ:
Seriously, just stop getting in our way~!
Last time you even caused a Calamity~.
はぁ～～～っ、邪魔～～！？ それは、こっちの台詞でしょ～っ！？<br>大穴の中の:
Hahhh~~? Getting in YOUR way!? That's OUR line~!
You keep taking all the valuables from the Abyss~!
前線基地だかなんだか知らないけど、<br>我が物顔でなんでもかんでも採ってくのや:
I don't care about your 'forward base' or whatever,
but could you stop taking everything like you own the place~?
そーだ、そーだ！<br>邪魔ばっかしてるのは、お前たちだ～！:
Yeah! Yeah!
You guys are the ones always getting in the way~!
その時、街全体が震えるような、甲高いサイレンが鳴り響く！: At that moment, a shrill siren rings out, shaking the entire city!
すると、崩れかけたビル群の屋上から、無数のサーチライトが一斉に<br>冷たい光の:
From the rooftops of crumbling buildings,
searchlights sweep the ground like cold spears.
なんか、あっちのビルの上、光ってない？: Hey, isn't something glowing on top of that building over there?
ピカピカーーってして、グルグル動いてる～！: It's all flashy and spinning around~!
何？ 光魔法？ 雷魔法！？: What is that? Light magic? Thunder magic!?
あんたたちがバカみたいに大声で喋ってたからでしょ？: This is because you two were yelling so loudly like idiots!
はぁっ！？ 濡れ衣着せないでよっ！<br>アンタたちだって、結構なボリュームで喋:
Hah!? Don't pin this on us!
You guys were talking just as loud!
その時、無機質な足音と共に、今まで物音一つしなかったビルの陰から、<br>無数の:
With cold, mechanical footsteps, countless security robots emerge
from the shadows of buildings that had been utterly silent until now.
警告。不法侵入者を認識。これより、対象の排除を開始する！<br>繰り返す……:
Warning. Unauthorized intruders detected. Commencing target
elimination. Repeat...
感情のない合成音声が、サイレンと共に木霊する。: An emotionless synthesized voice echoes alongside the sirens.
こいつら何台いるの！？: How many of these things are there!?
なんなのよぉ～！<br>どいつもこいつも邪魔ばっかりして～！:
What is this~!
Everything keeps getting in my way~!
言い争いは後だ！ とにかく逃げるぞ！: Save the arguing for later! Just run!
